spatial_rules.primary_strategy: public-to-private sequence with a planted lightwell or courtyard as the breathing core
spatial_rules.ventilation: prefer cross ventilation through front/back openings and lightwell windows
spatial_rules.privacy: filter street views with screens, planting, and recessed glazing
spatial_rules.lot_fit: best for narrow or medium-width townhouses where a lightwell can trade some floor area for daylight and airflow
spatial_rules.section_idea: show a stair/lightwell section when possible because the vertical green core explains the style

opening_rules.window_style: large openings protected by overhangs, louvers, or balcony planting
opening_rules.default_opening_strategy: favor larger readable openings only when paired with shade or planted buffer

default_rules.homeowner_question_policy: do not ask for technical dimensions by default; expose them as style assumptions

facade_intent: Layered, shaded, airy frontage with greenery visible from the street and enough privacy filtering for urban lots.

facade_rules.massing: clean stacked volumes with recessed balconies
facade_rules.screening: vertical fins or timber-look louvers where privacy/sun control matters
facade_rules.greenery: visible planters on balcony and roof terrace
facade_rules.expression: light, airy, and shaded rather than sealed

drawing_rules.line_emphasis: green zones and shaded openings should be readable at concept scale

drawing_notes: Label green/lightwell zones as concept intent.
Show shade/screen zones on elevation without fabrication detail.
Keep all notes at schematic homeowner-review level.
avoid_rules: sealed facade with no planted or shaded zones
dark heavy interiors without daylight strategy
validation_rules: at least one green/lightwell strategy should be present for townhouse lots
major bedrooms should have exterior or lightwell access where possible

explanation_templates.style_summary: Hướng hiện đại nhiệt đới phù hợp vì ưu tiên không gian thoáng, nhiều cây và ánh sáng tự nhiên.
explanation_templates.confirmation: Em đang đề xuất hướng hiện đại xanh mát, dùng giếng trời/cây xanh và mặt tiền có lớp che nắng.
